name: sk-design
description: Design-family parent hub: the single advisor-routable home for distinctive, intentional UI design and the full design surface. Routes any design query to six modes via mode-registry.json — five packetKind:"workflow" modes (interface: visual direction, taste, and interface build judgment; foundations: color, typography, layout, spacing, hierarchy, design tokens, theming; motion: animation, transitions, micro-interactions, reduced motion; audit: accessibility, performance, responsive, anti-slop detection, design quality scoring; md-generator: extract a live site's real CSS into a v3 Style Reference DESIGN.md via an embedded Playwright pipeline) plus one packetKind:"transport" mode (design-mcp-open-design: drives the external Open Design app's od CLI and stdio MCP server, gated behind sk-design's own judgment for any design-affecting operation). The hub holds no per-mode logic; each mode keeps its own contract and cites the shared design reference base.
trigger_examples: make this landing page look less templated
build an OKLCH color token system with dark mode
set a typographic scale and spacing system
animate the menu with a reduced-motion fallback
audit this UI for accessibility and anti-slop issues
score the design quality and list P0/P1 findings
extract a design system from a live website into DESIGN.md
capture a site's real CSS tokens as a Style Reference
wire Open Design's MCP server into opencode so I can drive od cli
